metadata.description: AI agents and skills for automated software development

plugins.name: triage-agent
plugins.description: Analyzes issues to determine actionability; no skill dependencies

plugins.name: architect-agent
plugins.description: Designs solution architecture; includes security-awareness and scalability-resilience skills

plugins.name: implementer-agent
plugins.description: Implements solutions; includes security-awareness, scalability-resilience, and code-quality-fundamentals skills

plugins.name: test-engineer
plugins.description: Writes unit and integration tests; includes code-quality-fundamentals and test-patterns skills

plugins.name: security-reviewer
plugins.description: Reviews code for security vulnerabilities; includes security-awareness and security-owasp skills

plugins.name: pr-reviewer
plugins.description: Reviews PRs for quality; includes security-awareness, code-quality-fundamentals, and code-review-standards skills

plugins.name: go-skills
plugins.description: Go development skill with idioms, patterns, and examples; standalone, no agent

plugins.name: shipwright-full
plugins.description: All 6 agents + all 7 skills in one install
